basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Field/Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Field/Lab Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST and women.

qualification.details: Field/Lab Assistant: Intermediate/12th Passed in agriculture/Science/related subjects. Experience of working in field and lab, equipment handling and maintenance is desirable.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 20,000/- per Month (Fixed) & 10% increment each year
salary_details.details: Field/Lab Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- per Month (Fixed) with 10% increment each year.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Field/Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI Field/Lab Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 08 June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Field/Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate or 12th grade in agriculture, science, or related subjects. Experience in field and lab work is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Field/Lab Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for OBC, SC/ST, and women candidates.

faq.question: Q4. How much will the Field/Lab Assistant be paid?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month. Additionally, there is a provision for a 10% increment each year.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening of applications, followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates. This ensures a thorough evaluation of all applicants.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Field/Lab Assistant position?
faq.answer: The position of Field/Lab Assistant is on a contract basis. This means the employment is for a specific duration as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute located?
faq.answer: The ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110012. The recruitment is for a position at this institute.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is 26-02. This number is important for referencing the specific job notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be sent with the application?
faq.answer: You need to send self-attested scanned copies of original documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs, in a single PDF file.
